terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Welcome to VD Nails. Using our online store and services requires unconditional acceptance of the following terms. Please read them carefully before proceeding with any transaction.
terms.s1Body: This website is the official online store of VD Nails. We reserve the right to freely modify, revise or remove these terms of use and transaction conditions whenever deemed necessary, undertaking to inform consumers of any change through the pages of this online store.
terms.s2Body: We are committed to the accuracy and completeness of the information provided in our online store regarding the identity of the business, as well as the characteristics of the products offered. However:
terms.s2Li1: There may be slight variations in the colors of polishes/products, as their depiction depends on the resolution and display settings of each user's screen.
terms.s2Li2: We reserve the right to change prices without prior notice. Customers are always charged the price in effect at the time their order was placed.
terms.s3Body: To make purchases or book appointments, users may create a personal account. The user is solely responsible for:
terms.s3Li1: Maintaining the confidentiality of their password.
terms.s3Li2: The accuracy and truthfulness of the details they provide (name, phone, email). VD Nails bears no responsibility for failure to communicate or deliver due to incorrect details.
terms.s4Body: Placing an order does not automatically guarantee stock reservation. In the event a product appears available but has sold out due to simultaneous purchases:
terms.s4Li1: VD Nails undertakes to inform the customer immediately (by phone or email).
terms.s4Li2: The customer has the right to either cancel the order with a full refund, replace the product, or wait for new stock to arrive.
terms.s5Body: All content of the online store, including but not limited to the VD Nails logo, images, photographs, graphics and texts, is the intellectual property of the business and is protected under applicable Greek and European law. Any copying, reproduction or resale of the content without our prior written permission is prohibited.
terms.s6Body: VD Nails is not responsible for any technical issues users may experience when accessing the website, related to the compatibility of their own infrastructure (e.g. outdated browser, viruses). Additionally, care products are intended for external/professional use. Please read the ingredients carefully before use in case of allergies. The company is not liable for any allergic reactions resulting from improper use.
terms.s7Body: For any clarification regarding these terms, please contact us at info@vdnails.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At VD Nails, we fully respect your personal data and are committed to protecting it in accordance with the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This policy explains what kind of information we collect, how we use it and how we protect it.
privacy.s1Body: When you register with our store, book an appointment or complete an order, we only collect the absolutely necessary data:
privacy.s1Li1: Identification & Contact Details: Full name, email address and phone number.
privacy.s1Li2: Shipping Details: Your preferred pickup locker (Locker) via the BoxNow network, or your shipping address.
privacy.s1Li3: Account Data: Your order and appointment history. Your password is stored strictly encrypted.
privacy.s2Title: 2. How do we use your data?
privacy.s2Body: We use your data exclusively for the following purposes:
privacy.s2Li1: To process and ship your order.
privacy.s2Li2: To confirm and manage your appointments.
privacy.s2Li3: To send you informational emails about the status of your order.
privacy.s2Li4: To comply with our tax and legal obligations.
privacy.s3Title: 3. Who do we share your data with?
privacy.s3Body: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for advertising purposes. Our partners are:
privacy.s3Li2: Brevo: For sending order and appointment confirmation emails.
privacy.s4Title: 4. How do we protect your data?
privacy.s4Body: We have taken strict technical measures:
privacy.s4Li1: All communication is encrypted via an SSL (HTTPS) certificate.
privacy.s4Li2: Passwords go through a strong encryption process.
privacy.s4Li3: Technical Monitoring (Error Tracking): We use the Sentry service to identify and resolve technical errors in the application. Sentry anonymously collects technical data (such as device and browser information) solely to improve the stability of the service and does not process your personal data.
privacy.s5Body: You have the right to access, correct or delete your data at any time.
privacy.s6Body: For any request, contact us at info@vdnails.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Welcome to the VD Nails online store. Respecting your privacy and protecting your personal data are a priority for us. In this policy we explain what cookies are, how we use them and how you can manage your preferences.
cookies.s1Title: 1. What are Cookies and Local Storage?
cookies.s1Body: Cookies are small text files stored on your computer or mobile device. At VD Nails we use cookies and storage technologies (such as Local Storage) to make your browsing smooth and to improve our services.
cookies.s2Title: 2. What types of technologies do we use?
cookies.s2ABody: This data is necessary for the proper functioning of the website and does not require consent.
cookies.s2ALi1: Shopping Cart: Local Storage remembers your products.
cookies.s2ALi2: Login/Security: Secure keys (Tokens) to keep you signed in.
cookies.s2ALi3: Technical Monitoring (Sentry): We use the Sentry service to identify technical errors. Cookies set by Sentry are necessary to ensure the technical correctness of the application and the stability of our services.
cookies.s2BBody: Provided you give us your consent, we use tools such as Google Analytics to understand how you use our website and to improve it.
cookies.s2CBody: These cookies may be set by advertising partners (e.g. Facebook, TikTok) to show you relevant ads on other websites.
cookies.s3Body: You can manage your preferences via the Cookie Banner on our website or through your browser's settings (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, etc.).

returns.title: Returns & Cancellations Policy
returns.intro: At VD Nails we want you to be completely satisfied with your purchases and services. However, we understand you may need to return a product. Below you will find the detailed terms and conditions for product returns and appointment cancellations.
returns.s1Body: You have the right to return your order within 14 calendar days of the day you received your parcel, without having to state a reason.
returns.s1Li1: The product must be in its original, perfect condition.
returns.s1Li2: The factory packaging must not have been opened/tampered with.
returns.s1Li3: It must be accompanied by proof of purchase.
returns.s1Note: Note: Shipping costs for returning products due to a change of mind are borne by the customer.
returns.s2Body: For hygiene and health protection reasons, returns are NOT accepted for the following products if their packaging has been unsealed or they have been used:
returns.s2Li3: Manicure/pedicure tools that have been removed from their protective packaging
returns.s3Body: In the rare case that you receive a product that is defective, damaged in transit, or different from what you ordered, we take full responsibility.
returns.s3Li1: Please contact us within 48 hours of receipt.
returns.s3Li2: Send us an email at info@vdnails.com with a photo of the damaged product.
returns.s3Li3: We will promptly send you a new product or refund you, at our own shipping expense.
returns.s4Body: Once we receive and inspect the returned product, we will send you a confirmation email. Your refund will be completed within 7-14 business days. The amount will be refunded to the same payment method used for your original purchase (or to a bank account you specify, if you paid by cash on delivery).
returns.s5Body: We understand that your schedule may change. If you need to cancel or reschedule your appointment for care services, please let us know at least 24 hours in advance. This helps us serve other customers on our waiting list.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.intro: At VD Nails we make sure your favorite products reach you as quickly as possible and with complete safety. We work with reliable distribution networks to offer you the best possible service.
shipping.s1Body: All orders placed by 2:00 PM (business days) are processed and shipped the same day. We offer the following delivery methods:
shipping.s1Li1: Delivery to a BoxNow locker (24/7 Lockers): The fastest and most flexible option. Delivery time is usually 1-2 business days. Once your parcel arrives at the locker you selected, you receive an SMS with the PIN code (unlock code) to collect your parcel at any time, 24 hours a day.
shipping.s1Li2: Store Pickup (Click & Collect): You can pick up your order completely free of charge from our physical store during our opening hours, after being notified.
shipping.s2Body: Shipping costs are automatically calculated in your shopping cart:
shipping.s3Body: Once your order is ready and handed over to the courier, you will receive an informational email (at the address you provided at checkout) which will include the Tracking Number. With this number you can track the progress of your parcel at any time through the courier's website.
shipping.s4Body: We make every effort to deliver your products on time. However, VD Nails is not responsible for delays caused by unforeseeable factors, such as extreme weather conditions, strikes, unexpected courier issues, or periods of extreme demand (e.g. Black Friday, holidays).
